hero_subtitle: SFTY helps regulated digital asset businesses implement robust private cloud security controls with audit-ready evidence, role-based access, and governance for enterprise trust and operational readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit logs need stronger deployment control
problem_description: Compliance teams managing private cloud deployments face challenges supporting audit evidence remains secure and traceable. Without clear governance and access controls, it becomes difficult to maintain evidence integrity and support bank due diligence requirements effectively.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity within a controlled private cloud environment so compliance teams can securely maintain traceable records and support bank due diligence.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit log
workflow_description: SFTY manages role-based access, user permissions, audit logs and evidence governance to support secure private cloud compliance and institutional trust requirements.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated controls. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a secure, governed compliance layer for private cloud deployment that preserves evidence, enforces access controls and supports audit-ready operational security.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY delivers a secure, audit-ready compliance layer for VASPs requiring controlled provider orchestration, evidence integrity and governance in private cloud environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for private cloud compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY offers a compliance control layer designed to support regulated digital asset firms in private cloud environments, supporting secure workflows, audit logs, role-based access and evidence integrity.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support secure private cloud?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports private cloud deployment by enforcing role-based permissions, maintaining detailed audit logs, enabling controlled access governance and supporting evidence-grade logging within regulated infrastructure.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision history, case evidence and review logs in an audit-ready format, supporting traceability and inspection readiness for regulated digital asset compliance teams.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening provider outputs into one operational workflow without requiring provider replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing compliance providers and structures their outputs into workflows, cases, decisions and audit evidence, rather than replacing them.
final_title: Review private cloud security with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY supports secure deployment, role-based access, audit logging and governance for enterprise-grade compliance in private cloud environments.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
